title: PerfectDecorated
description: This Modpack is perfect for decorating. It has everything you need for your next build!
body:
- **🧱 What is PerfectDecorated?**

PerfectDecorated is a comprehensive modpack focused on decoration, creative building, and immersive world design. Featuring over 50 carefully selected mods, it combines powerful building mechanics, high-quality furniture and decor assets, cinematic shaders, and tools for both creators and survival players.

Unlike many decoration-focused packs, PerfectDecorated emphasizes performance, compatibility, and flexibility—allowing you to build freely in Creative Mode or enjoy full gameplay in Survival Mode.

****


- **✨ The Vision**
> 
> PerfectDecorated is made for players who see Minecraft not just as a game, but as a tool for creative expression:
> Want to build breathtaking structures with intricate details?
> Want to bring atmosphere, depth, and life to your cities, settlements, or film sets?
> Want to not just build your world, but tell stories, stage scenes, and present them?
> Then this modpack is your toolbox.
> 
> 
> **🔧 Core Features & Key Elements**
> 
> **🎨 Precision Building with Bits and Chisels**
> Edit blocks down to the pixel level. Create custom furniture, ornaments, sculptures, or intricate architectural details—with nearly unlimited creative freedom. (Note: Some modded blocks may have texture issues.)
> 
> **🧍 Lifelike Worlds with EasyNPC**
> 
> Create custom NPCs with unique dialogue, outfits, animations, and roles. Perfect for roleplay servers, bustling cities, or interactive scenes.
> 
> **🪑 High-Quality Furniture & Decor Mods**
> 
> Multiple furniture mods (e.g., MrCrayfish’s Furniture, Macaw's Furniture & Lights) make interiors more than functional—they tell stories. Furnish homes, cafés, shops, or entire streets with realism.
> 
> **🔦 Supplementaries 1 & 2 – Small Details, Big Impact**
> 
> Minor items like wall lamps, faucets, candles, hourglasses, and more bring life and depth to your world. Perfect for adding polish and authenticity.
> 
> **🎬 Made for Creators & Presentation**
> 
> PerfectDecorated is also designed for content creators, map makers, and builders who want to showcase or stage their worlds.
> 
> **🟩 Greenscreen Mod**
> 
> Chroma key blocks let you do true greenscreen editing directly in Minecraft—ideal for videos, intros, animations, and roleplay productions.
> 
> **🎥 Motion Capture**
> 
> Record movements, assign them to NPCs, or use them to create your own cutscenes and scenarios. Fully compatible with EasyNPC.
> 
> **🌅 Solaris Shader**
> 
> Cinematic lighting, soft ambiance, realistic shadows, and deep color tones—without killing performance.
> 
> **🛠️ Performance & Tools**
> 
> PerfectDecorated doesn’t just look good—it runs smoothly even on mid-range systems, thanks to carefully selected performance mods:
> 
> Sodium: Significantly boosts FPS without quality loss
> Iris: Enables shaders with optimized compatibility
> WorldEdit: Essential for large-scale builds, city planning, copy/paste, or terraforming
> 
> **🎮 Gameplay Flexibility**
> 
> Whether you're designing freely in Creative Mode or building your dream world block by block in Survival Mode, the modpack is optimized for both. Loot tables, balancing, and mod weight were intentionally adjusted so nothing disrupts your building flow.

****
